errorRoutes.forbiddenDescription: We apologize for the inconvenience, but you don't have permissions on this resource
errorRoutes.unauthorizedLoggedIn: You are trying to access a protected resource.
errorRoutes.loginRequired: You are trying to access a protected resource, please first
errorRoutes.contact: If you are certain you have the correct web address but are encountering an error, please contact the
errorRoutes.connectionRefusedDescription: The backend is not responding, please check if you have started Plone and verify your PLONE_API_PATH environment variable or the apiPath setting in your project configuration.
errorRoutes.connectionRefusedProduction: We apologize for the inconvenience, but the backend of the site you are accessing is not available right now. Please, try again later
errorRoutes.notFound: This page does not seem to exist…
errorRoutes.notFoundDescription: We apologize for the inconvenience, but the page you are trying to access does not exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or return to the homepage.
